rulings.Case Title: JOHN SOLLNER et al VS. ANDREW LINTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Questions At Deposition Of Deft Mariana Cervelleria
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 13, 2013, line 3. - PLAINTIFFS JOHN SOLLNER AND SCOTT JACQUES' Motion To Compel Answers To Questions At Deposition Of Defendant Mariana Cervelleria. PLAINTIFFS JOHN SOLLNER AND SCOTT JACQUES' Motion To Compel Answers To Questions At Deposition Of Defendant Mariana Cervelleria is Granted in part. Defendant Cervelleira is directed to answer the following questions: If you have to prove that you paid WB Coyle $1,500 in November 2010, you could not find any documents whatsoever that could show that? So if you have to go about demonstrating that you paid WB Coyle $1,500, how would you do that? Have you and Mr. Coyle traveled anywhere else in and around the country beside the places that we've talked about? When you go out to dinner with Mr. Coyle, as you indicated you do, frequently who pays for those meals? When you got out to drinks, who pays? Has Mr. Coyle ever provided you with assistance in any legal matters that you've been involved in? Has Mr. Coyle ever provided you with any assistance in this matter? No sanctions are awarded. = (D501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN VS. HENRY DONALD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 13, 2013, line 5. - DEFENDANT HENRY DONALD Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. DEFENDANT HENRY DONALD Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is Granted. The default and default judgment are set aside in light of California's strong policy for deciding cases on their merits. Defendant is ordered to post back rent in the amount of $2,700. =(D501/REQ)
